perturbation.original_text: Following the expiration of the PROGRAM, or a termination of the PROGRAM as provided for above, the rights and obligations respecting NONDISCLOSURE OF PROPRIETARY INFORMATION set forth in this Agreement will survive and remain in effect for a period of five years.
perturbation.changed_text: Following the expiration of the PROGRAM, or a termination of the PROGRAM as provided for above, the rights and obligations respecting NONDISCLOSURE OF PROPRIETARY INFORMATION set forth in this Agreement will survive and remain in effect for a period of two years.
perturbation.explanation: The change alters the survival period for non-disclosure obligations from five years to two years. This modification causes an in-text contradiction by making the duration inconsistent, casting doubt on the correct enforcement timeframe.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Following the expiration of the PROGRAM, or a termination of the PROGRAM as provided for above, the rights and obligations respecting NONDISCLOSURE OF PROPRIETARY INFORMATION set forth in this Agreement will survive and remain in effect for a period of two years.
perturbation.justification: The original text specified a five-year survival period for non-disclosure obligations. The changed text reduces this period to two years. The contradicted text, however, also specifies a two-year survival period. While the changed text and contradicted text are now aligned, the change from five years to two years created an in-text contradiction with the earlier five-year term that was originally stated. Even though they have the same output, the change in the original text broke the original document which means there IS an in-text contradiction.
